recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by at least 1% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The latest WTI reading rose to 84.82 $/bbl (+1.91%), showing a gain rather than the required 1% drop.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by 2% within the next 24h
recent.evidence: The latest WTI signal shows the price up +1.91% to 84.82, not down 2%, so the forecast did not come true.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will rise by 2% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: WTI started at 84.52 and the latest snapshot shows only 84.71 (~+0.22%), far short of the 2% rise (~86.21) required within the window.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by 1.5% within the next 24 hours
